title: Trump Faces a Decision on Whether to Start a Ground War in Iran
summary_full: The president wants a negotiation, but the Iranians say they are refusing until a cease-fire is declared. And while Marines and the 82nd Airborne Division offer new leverage, the risks escalate quickly.
summary_public: The president wants a negotiation, but the Iranians say they are refusing until a cease-fire is declared. And while Marines and the 82nd Airborne Division offer new leverage, the risks escalate quickly.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Start a Ground War in Iran
